inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of filament or resin per kilogram. Typical range for standard PLA is $20-50, engineering materials up to $200.

inputs.label: Material Usage (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated weight of material used for the print job. Derived from part volume and infill density.

inputs.label: Print Time (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total estimated print time. Affects machine utilization and labor cost.

inputs.label: Machine Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation, maintenance, and electricity cost per hour of printer operation. Typical range $2-20.

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Operator's hourly wage including overhead. Based on local labor market.

inputs.label: Labor Time (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time spent on setup, post-processing, and quality check. Typically 10-30% of print time.

inputs.label: Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Facility, administrative, and indirect costs as percentage of direct costs. Industry standard 15-30%.

inputs.label: Target Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on the job. Typical range 20-50% for custom manufacturing.

inputs.label: Waste (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste due to supports, failed prints, or calibration. Lean manufacturing target <5%.

inputs.label: Post-Processing Cost
inputs.businessContext: Additional costs for sanding, painting, or assembly. Often quoted separately.

inputs.label: Shipping Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to deliver the finished part to the customer.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input estimates. Low adds a risk buffer, high uses raw values.

thresholds.wastePercent > 10: High waste percentage may indicate process inefficiency.
thresholds.targetMarginPercent < 10: Margin below 10% may not cover risks.
thresholds.materialCostPerKg > 200: Material cost is high; consider alternative materials.

formulas.dataConfidenceAdjusted: case dataConfidence when 'low' then totalCost * 1.2 when 'medium' then totalCost * 1.1 else totalCost end

suggestedActions: wastePercent > 10 ? 'Optimize print settings to reduce waste.' : ''

premiumFeatures: PDF export of detailed cost breakdown
